title: The Broken Script Plus
description: Additional events and behaviors for existing entities of The Broken Script
body:
**DISCLAIMER: This mod does not add any new fanmade entities, and does not expand on the lore. It focuses on adding more to existing content. If that's what you're looking for, check out [The Broken Script: Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script-additions)**

**DISCLAIMER 2: PLS DO NOT REUPLOAD THE MOD ON OTHER STUFF WITHOUT PERMISSION THX**

**DISCLAIMER 3: The mod's gallery is pretty empty. If you want to contribute to it, send your own images and screenshots on the Discord's related forum.**

# THE BROKEN SCRIPT PLUS
### Here I am. Can you hear me?

**The only official version is on Modrinth.**

### THINGS YOU (might) WANT TO KNOW BEFORE PLAYING
- Mod cannot (currently) ban you from your world
- Mod cannot (currently) crash your game (unless there are bugs I don't know about)
- Mod cannot (currently and probably never) create txt files on your desktop
- Mod cannot (currently) shake your game window
- Mod cannot (currently) destroy your buildings
- Mod cannot (and will never) mess around with your PC
- IT'S BETTER TO PLAY WITHOUT SHADERS OR WITH SHADERS THAT DO NOT CHANGE THE SUN'S TEXTURE
- Config does not work right now.

The Broken Script Plus is a (VERY) slow mod that expands on existing content of TBS. There are new events, and new behaviors for existing entities.

It adds content to various already existing entites to not only enhance your playthrough with more unexpected behaviors that are not present in the original mod, while also making some entities that are way too rare a bit more common by making them appear in different scenarios.

It also adds more events that may lead to changes related to spawns, or subtle things to make you feel more fear or paranoïa.

![Corrupted Sun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/147a5c8aa3258ceee1235e0f9ca1cdd865ae4ab9.png)

The goal is to expand on existing content that people already know about instead of adding new content that the player would know nothing about. The mod aims to make the original mod feel more complete.
If that is not what you're looking for, and instead you want entirely new content, check out [The Broken Script: Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script-additions)

**FAQ**

- Will there be a forge 1.20.1 port?

Probably not, nope.
- Will there be a TBS 2.0 version?

Not immediately, that's for sure
- Will it add faces to entities?

Never.

# CREDITS

**THE BROKEN SCRIPT**: Writers of the Script

**ORIGINAL ARG**: Mark101
